How's it going everyone? I wanted to do a quick video about the face view of somebody who's handling your ads. You can send them an invite to your business manager account and they're able to go through and make those changes to ads without having to have admin access to your actual profile logging into your actual profile. Now with the business manager help page it give you all the information you're going to need. It tells you what to use a business manager account, what the different features and settings are because they update it quite a bit, how to handle roles and permissions if you're having other people use it. It walks you through the setup process, how to actually accept an invitation if you send it to somebody else to access it, and how to verify your business and how to add a payment method. And that gives you how to change different things about your business manager profile. Giving gives you some troubleshooting steps. So go through this help page it's really useful. Facebook keeps updated all the time that way when they do make changes to the business manager page you'll know where to get help from. I hope you enjoyed this video and hope you have a great rest of your day.
